visualStyle.name: precision-motion-math
visualStyle.description: Premium mathematical motion visuals for Algerian BAC courses: dark ink workspace, crisp white notation, teal active motion, amber fixed points and destinations, restrained red for illegal moves, clean graphs, rails, arrows, and formula chips.
visualStyle.promptPrefix: Use the precision-motion-math theme: dark ink workspace, crisp white mathematical notation, teal active motion, amber fixed points and destinations, restrained red only for illegal moves, clean graphs, rails, arrows, formula chips, high contrast, uncluttered BAC-ready educational composition.
visualStyle.negativePrompt: No scanned textbook pages, no copied worksheet layout, no decorative blobs, no childish cartoon style, no cluttered full-page formula dump, no unreadable dense Arabic text inside the image.

assets.title: ثلاث آلات للمتتاليات
assets.prompt: Show three premium math machines side by side: constant-step machine adding 3, constant-multiplier machine multiplying by 1.5, and feedback recurrence machine sending previous output into a function. Use Arabic labels: خطوة ثابتة، ضرب ثابت، تغذية راجعة. Keep notation crisp and minimal.
assets.generationPrompt:
Use the precision-motion-math theme: dark ink workspace, crisp white mathematical notation, teal active motion, amber fixed points and destinations, restrained red only for illegal moves, clean graphs, rails, arrows, formula chips, high contrast, uncluttered BAC-ready educational composition.

Show three premium math machines side by side: constant-step machine adding 3, constant-multiplier machine multiplying by 1.5, and feedback recurrence machine sending previous output into a function. Use Arabic labels: خطوة ثابتة، ضرب ثابت، تغذية راجعة. Keep notation crisp and minimal.

Avoid: No scanned textbook pages, no copied worksheet layout, no decorative blobs, no childish cartoon style, no cluttered full-page formula dump, no unreadable dense Arabic text inside the image.
